context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-sell sections are fully implemented. Recently Viewed works on all 3 pages (TileCollectionsPage, CollectionDetailPage, TileDetailPage). When materials/tools/accessories/flooring products are published, the You May Also Need section will automatically appear with recommendations. The localStorage key is 'tile_station_recently_viewed'.
